segment.source: Renders a floating, initially hidden button with an up chevron that appears after roughly 300px of scrolling and returns the visitor to the page top; the label text is optional and the position selectable (bottom right, left, or center). Use it for: long documents, one-page sites, or article pages built from lengthy sources — it maps to no document content and is added as a usability aid. Prefer 'Table of Contents Navigation' for links to sections.
